---
title: "RevealJS auto-stretch fixture"
format:
  revealjs:
    auto-stretch: true
filters:
  - quarto
  - ../../_extensions/smart-typst-tables/smart-typst-tables.lua
smart-tables:
  revealjs:
    max-height: 65vh
    overflow: auto
    font-size: 0.7em
---

## Auto-stretch remains controlled

| Team | Value | Description |
|---|---:|---|
| Data | 91,0 % | The table wrapper should scroll before a table forces excessive slide scaling. |
